description_long: This croissant features a golden-brown, glossy exterior with a slightly curved, crescent shape and a visibly flaky, layered texture. The surface is adorned with a generous sprinkling of white sesame seeds, adding both visual and textural contrast. The pastry's crust appears crisp and slightly shiny, suggesting a well-baked finish with a light egg wash. The ends of the croissant are tightly coiled, while the central body is plump and rounded, indicating a soft, airy interior. Subtle ridges and folds along the length of the croissant highlight its laminated dough structure. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a classic French-style croissant with a seeded topping.
description: A golden-brown, flaky croissant with a glossy finish and sesame seeds sprinkled on top, showcasing distinct layers and a classic crescent shape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full crescent shape, prominent layers, and sesame seeds scattered across the glossy surface.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the tightly coiled tip and spiral layering, with visible sesame seeds on the rounded end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the broad, rounded body and even distribution of sesame seeds, with clear lamination lines.
description_view_3: Other end view focusing on the coiled tip and spiral pattern, with a slightly more compact appearance and visible seeds.
attribute_pastry_type: classic butter croissant with sesame seeds
